escalation_00.text: The committee is reviewing the proposal.
We will wait for the final report.

escalation_25.text: The committee strongly suggests reviewing the proposal.
We need the final report soon.

escalation_50.text: The committee demands an immediate review.

escalation_75.text: This delay is entirely unacceptable and dangerous.
Submit the report or face consequences.

escalation_100.text: We will physically dismantle the committee if they fail.
You are fired immediately. Leave the premises.
